# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# schema.yaml (for properties used in the template)
imports:
  - path: template.jinja

properties:
  appName:
    type: string
    description: Base name for the application resources. Used to prefix resource names and ensure uniqueness.
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 20
    pattern: "^[a-z0-9](?:[a-z0-9-]{0,61}[a-z0-9])?$" # DNS-like name for resources
  region:
    type: string
    description: GCP region for regional resources like Cloud SQL and Cloud Storage.
    default: us-central1
  zone:
    type: string
    description: GCP zone for Compute Engine instances. Must be in the chosen region.
    default: us-central1-b
  machineType:
    type: string
    description: Compute Engine machine type for the instances.
    default: e2-micro
  diskSizeGb:
    type: integer
    description: Boot disk size (in GB) for Compute Engine instances.
    default: 10
    minimum: 10
  instanceGroupSize:
    type: integer
    description: Number of instances in the managed instance group.
    default: 2
    minimum: 1
  sqlDatabaseVersion:
    type: string
    description: Cloud SQL database version (e.g., MYSQL_8_0, POSTGRES_14, SQLSERVER_2019_STANDARD).
    default: MYSQL_8_0
  sqlTier:
    type: string
    description: Cloud SQL instance tier (e.g., db-f1-micro for MySQL/PostgreSQL, db-n1-standard-1 for SQL Server).
    default: db-f1-micro
  sqlDiskSizeGb:
    type: integer
    description: Cloud SQL disk size (in GB).
    default: 20
    minimum: 10
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    description: Name for the primary Cloud SQL database.
    default: app_database
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 63
  sqlUserName:
    type: string
    description: User name for the Cloud SQL database.
    default: app_user
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 16
  sqlPassword:
    type: string
    description: Password for the Cloud SQL database user.
    minLength: 8
    maxLength: 30
    # Note: Deployment Manager properties are not inherently secret.
    # Treat this password with care. Consider using KMS or Secret Manager for production.
